text:
Subject: Application for Automation Engineer / Junior Automation Technician - Kerolos 
Atef Adly 
Dear Hiring Manager, 
I am writing to express my strong interest in the Automation position at your company. As a 
Mechatronics Engineer with direct, hands-on experience managing and maintaining a 
complex 15-machine industrial production line, I specialize in delivering robust automation 
solutions, minimizing system downtime, and ensuring seamless hardware-software 
integration. 
What differentiates my profile is the ability to bridge the gap between theoretical 
mechatronics and floor-level engineering. My core technical expertise includes: 
• PLC Programming & Logic Optimization: Developing and troubleshooting control 
logic, integrating sensors, and maintaining industrial communication networks. 
• Control Panel Engineering: Advanced wiring, circuit design, fault isolation, and 
integrating vital components such as Variable Frequency Drives (VFDs) and smart 
actuators. 
• Site Commissioning & Diagnostics: Rapid electrical and mechanical 
troubleshooting under high-pressure live operations, transitioning systems from 
installation to zero-defect execution. 
Having managed an active production ecosystem, I deeply understand the critical 
importance of reliability, system safety, and international engineering standards. I don't 
merely address superficial faults; I analyze systemic root causes to prevent recurring 
failures and enhance overall equipment effectiveness (OEE). 
I am highly motivated to bring my troubleshooting agility, engineering mindset, and passion 
for cutting-edge automation to your project teams and site operations. Thank you for your 
time, consideration, and review of my application. I look forward to the opportunity to 
discuss how my practical skills can add immediate value to your upcoming projects. 
Yours sincerely, 
Kerolos Atef Adly 
Mechatronics Engineer / Automation Specialist 
+01220714614 
kerolos.a.adly@gmail.com 
https://www.linkedin.com/in/kerolosatefadly/
